posts.author: art (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to do something that I would think is very simple to solve. What I want to do is when a Status Column change in Monday from “A” to “B”, to add a event in Google calendar. Since the connection from Monday straight to Google Calendar is very limited, I am using zappier.

They did not have a option of when a column change from “A” to “B” so I had to just use the option “Specific Column Value Changed in Board in monday.com”.

WhatsApp Image 2022-01-07 at 1.47.49 PM1920×1440 351 KB

Fine, now, when I try to pull the address from Monday, it does not show in the dropdown list. Can anyone help me?
